# Contributing and review policy

Corrections and paper suggestions are welcome as GitHub issues or pull requests. Please provide enough information for an independent reviewer to verify the proposal.

## Paper or version proposal

- Canonical title and public landing page
- DOI, arXiv ID, or publisher identifier
- Publication year and venue
- Suggested taxonomy paths with a short reason
- Official code URL, if one exists

## Factual correction

- Paper and exact version
- Field to change
- Page plus section, figure, or table locator
- Whether the statement is an author-reported fact, a derived fact, or a researcher judgement

Do not attach paywalled PDFs, credentials, institutional download links, or long verbatim excerpts. New papers remain candidates until the frozen policy gates and deterministic publication validation pass. Insufficient evidence produces a pending state; model output never bypasses the validator.
